Alearners are [[organisms]] incapable of learning. As such they do not use [[servitors]]. They may still respond to their environment but do so with fixed patterns, or possibly systems of learning simpler than servitors. 

Examples include bacteria. Sea cucumbers are learners {{citation needed}}

[[Category:Organisms]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Alearners]][[Category:Alearners]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
